All 9 active position cards written to `morning-work/` from the 00:47 pipeline run. Data is identical to the 02:48 condensed file (same Friday Feb 20 close prices). Cards validated against analyst rules before acceptance.

| Ticker | Verdict | P/L | Key Rule |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| NU | **REDUCE** | +5.5% | Rule 1: Non-recovery + GATED (2d) + P/L > 0% |
| STIM | **MONITOR** | -11.6% | Rule 16: WITHIN (8d), earnings CLEAR (22d) |
